### Modpack Intro
Welcome to one of the first 2b2t created anarchy modpack, created by anarhcy players for anarchy players.  The modpack comes with 4 veriations for 1.21.1/1.21.4. they are bare bones, balanced, building, and bloated.

The pack is filled with almost every mod a 2b2t player could use/need.
